bird.name: Olive-headed lorikeet
bird.summary: The olive-headed lorikeet (Trichoglossus euteles), also called the perfect lorikeet, is a species of parrot in the family Psittaculidae. It…

locations.name: 帝汶島
locations.summary: 帝汶島（印尼語：Pulau Timor，葡萄牙語：Ilha de Timor）是位於馬來群島南端的島嶼，為小巽他群島中面積最大者，總面積約30,777平方公里。該島地處東南亞海域，座標約為9°14′S 124°56′E，北臨弗洛勒斯海，南…

relations.subject: Olive-headed lorikeet
relations.evidence: It is found in forest, woodland and cultivated areas on Timor and smaller nearby islands

relations.subject: Olive-headed lorikeet
relations.evidence: https://doi.org/10.1071/MU03030 Their habitat are primary montane forest, secondary growth and savanna woodland at roughly 1000–2300 m
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
